p"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7460684591238482968","book_info":{"abstract":"【赛博朋克2077】【边缘行者】【系统】【穿越】【夜之城】【源计划】
通关游戏，赛博朋克2077的梁辰，闲着无聊，开始在游戏里大开杀戒，NCPD，暴恐机动队，纷纷赶来，但，我们的主角丝毫不在乎，因为只是游戏罢了。
然而让他没想到的是，他玩游戏的时候，突然穿越了，还穿越到夜之城，更恐怖的是，他在游戏里的大肆杀戮，在这里居然是真的……
看着包围自己的一辆辆警车，还有浮空车上的暴恐机动队，梁辰惊恐万状，他才不想死呢！好在，他在游戏里的满级义体都还在，应该可以逃走，的吧？
梁辰的传奇人生就此展开。
游戏主角，女V：梁辰帮帮我好吗，我快死了，必须闯一闯荒坂塔了，那有能救我的东西。
动漫主角，大卫•马丁内斯：梁辰，别和我抢露西，好不好，求求你了。
源计划•泯灭，雷克顿：呵呵，梁辰，来决一死战吧，暴君模式，启动！
多女主，主角会和露西，女V，帕南，朱迪，产生感情联系。
本书没有过度杀戮，主角人生有起有落，非纯爽文，非无敌文。
【前期有毒点，毒抗低的谨慎观看。】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b54ed8cae5a1fa8343f10ba79957550f","author":"月下寻自在","author_id":"","book_id":"7460684591238482968","book_name":"夜之城：开局被追捕","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382850","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1099人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":873,"name":"赛博朋克","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873&name=赛博朋克&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7460685026812772888","read_count":"1099","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"292376"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.9","serial_count":"152","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,多女主,赛博朋克,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8b5642f31fb9dc64a25f6c3cd8da5f11~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779285495&x-signature=ykaypKRMZTzAtk8h5n25L284MGw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"76880885655","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"92"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212158158620325D121936FF44AF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_durati
